name: General Tso's Chicken (Marius Kirschner)
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken legs, skinned & cut into six pieces each
1 tsp Cornstarch mixed with 1 tsp water
recipeInstructions:
1. Vigorously beat egg whites and cornstarch; add chicken pieces and toss to coat.
2. Heat oil in a large wok and add chicken pieces in batches, cooking each until golden, about 3 minutes, then drain.
3. Pour off all but 1 tbsp hot oil from the wok.
4. Add peppers and stir-fry for 15 seconds; add green scallion, minced ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 15 more seconds.
5. Add mixture of vinegar, soy, wine, and sugar, stirring until heated through.
6. Add cornstarch and water mixture and stir until the mixture is thickened.
7. Turn off heat, stir in sesame oil, garnish with scallion greens, and serve.
